user_prompt: ok change the demo to use 16 kHz because I think this SBC library only works from 16 KHz and up anyways, verify this if you need to
agent_reply: Changed [src/bt_audio_demo.cpp](c:/GitHubRepos/The-Fly/src/bt_audio_demo.cpp) to make the HFP audio demo 16 kHz-oriented.
- Replaced the 8 kHz/16 kHz split with a single `kHfpDemoSampleRate = 16000`.
- mSBC/wideband now configures the local I2S/PDM path at 16 kHz.
- CVSD/narrowband no longer pipes audio directly; it logs a warning and keeps audio disabled, since that native path is 8 kHz and would need resampling or a separate CVSD path.
- Updated comments to note that `libsbc` starts at `SBC_FREQ_16000`.
Verified locally: `libsbc` supports `16000`, `32000`, `44100`, and `48000` sample-rate modes, and the PlatformIO build passes.
